mapper.select: SELECT *, CASE WHEN sys06_menu_no IS NULL THEN sys06_menu_nm ELSE sys06_menu_no || ' ' || sys06_menu_nm END AS sys06_menu_nm_with_no FROM sys06_menu WHERE COALESCE(sys06_use_yn, 'true') = 'true' ORDER BY sys06_seq, sys06_menu_nm

SELECT *, CASE WHEN sys06_menu_no IS NULL THEN sys06_menu_nm ELSE sys06_menu_no || ' ' || sys06_menu_nm END AS sys06_menu_nm_with_no FROM sys06_menu INNER JOIN sys03_company_menu ON sys06_menu_id = sys03_menu_id WHERE COALESCE(sys03_use_yn, 'false') = 'true' AND sys03_company_id = #{companyId} AND sys06_parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY sys06_seq, sys06_menu_nm

SELECT DISTINCT sys06_menu.*, f_menu_nm_allpath(sys06_menu_id) AS sys06_menu_full_nm FROM sys06_menu INNER JOIN sys03_company_menu ON sys06_menu_id = sys03_menu_id INNER JOIN sys07_role_menu ON sys06_menu_id = sys07_menu_id AND sys07_use_yn = 'true' INNER JOIN sys05_user_role ON sys07_role_id = sys05_role_id WHERE sys03_company_id = #{companyId} AND sys05_user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY sys06_seq

SELECT sys06_menu.*, CASE WHEN sys07_role_menu_id IS NULL THEN 'false' ELSE 'true' END AS sys06_role_menu_yn FROM sys06_menu INNER JOIN sys03_company_menu ON sys06_menu_id = sys03_menu_id LEFT OUTER JOIN sys07_role_menu ON sys06_menu_id = sys07_menu_id AND sys07_role_id = #{roleId} WHERE sys03_company_id = #{companyId} ORDER BY sys06_seq
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys06_menu (sys06_parent_id, sys06_menu_nm, sys06_class_nm, sys06_seq, sys06_use_yn, sys06_note, sys06_menu_no, sys06_mobi_use_yn) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{menuName}, #{className}, #{seq}, #{useYn}, #{note}, #{menuNo}, #{mobiUseYn})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys06_menu SET sys06_menu_nm = #{menuName}, sys06_class_nm = #{className}, sys06_seq = #{seq}, sys06_use_yn = #{useYn}, sys06_note = #{note}, sys06_menu_no = #{menuNo}, sys06_mobi_use_yn = #{mobiUseYn} WHERE sys06_menu_id = #{menuId}
